rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Garnish Nondebtor Spouse'S Wages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 9, 2022 line 1. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION AND MOTION TO GARNISH NONDEBTOR SPOUSE'S WAGES is continued to October 28, 2022. By no later than September 23, 2022 Plaintiff to either (1) file a proof of service indicating that Fang has been served; or (2) file a supplemental brief limited to one-page citations to case authority allowing for an order under CCP 706.109 without notice to the person whose wages are to be garnished. No further argument is permitted. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN WU VS. SHU TONG ZHOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Deemed Admissions Or In The Alternative Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,778.00 Against Defendants Shu Tong Zhou And Ying Qin Cai (Motions)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 9, 2022 line 6. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND NOTICE OF HEARING FOR DEEMED ADMISSIONS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,778.00 AGAINST DEFENDANTS SHU TONG ZHOU AND YING QIN CAI is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Each Defendant must serve separate responses to the requests for admission, along with verifications within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Motion is otherwise DENIED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
